title: Masa Mod Translation Pack
description: This is a module Chinese localization resource pack specially made for the Masa series of mods.
body:
# ！！！注意！！！
**目前從 `v1.3.3` 版本開始只支援 1.21+ 以上的版本。**

**如果你是 1.20.x 及 1.19.x 版本的使用者，請下載 [v1.0.1 (1.19-1.20)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/masa-mod-translationpack/version/1.0.1(1.19-1.20)) 版本！**

# Resource Pack Introduction
This is a module Chinese localization resource pack specially made for the Masa series of mods. The supported series of mods are listed below

This Sinicization resource pack supports two languages, Traditional Chinese and Simplified Chinese, for players who do not understand English

After the application of this resource pack, the text descriptions of the mods setting interface, prompt box, etc. will be changed to Chinese, and the picture below shows the effect after application

![Image](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/IEt3hTCe/images/52e3fef544542756b39defab52c76b2b59569434.png)

## List of mods supported by this translation package

1.19.X, 1.20.X version:

MaLiLib
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/malilib

MiniHUD
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minihud

Litematica
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/litematica

Tweakeroo
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tweakeroo

Item Scroller
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/item-scrolle

MasaGadget
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/masa-gadget

1.20.5 and later version:
https://github.com/sakura-ryoko?tab=repositories

## Other
icon：TN_TechNoob

## Author Authorization
Author：醉梦巅峰、思夢Lri

醉梦巅峰 Bilibili：[Link](https://space.bilibili.com/13205801)

思夢Lri Github：[Link](https://github.com/DreamingLri/masa-mods-chinese)

Proof of Authorizing：https://i.imgur.com/XJ5KeEM.jpg

<details>
<summary>中文</summary>

# 資源包介紹
這是專門為 Masa 系列模組做的模組中文漢化資源包，支援的系列模組在下方列出

本漢化資源包支援繁體中文、簡體中文 2 種語言，給那些不懂英文的玩家使用

本資源包套用後會更動模組的設定介面、提示框等的文字說明為中文，下圖為套用後的效果

![圖片](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/IEt3hTCe/images/52e3fef544542756b39defab52c76b2b59569434.png)

## 此翻譯包支援的模組列表
1.19.X、1.20.X 版本：

MaLiLib
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/malilib

MiniHUD
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minihud

Litematica
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/litematica

Tweakeroo
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tweakeroo

Item Scroller
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/item-scrolle

MasaGadget
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/masa-gadget

1.20.5 含之後版本
https://github.com/sakura-ryoko?tab=repositories

## 其他
圖示：TN_TechNoob

作者：醉梦巅峰、思夢Lri

醉梦巅峰 Bilibili：[連結](https://space.bilibili.com/13205801)

思夢Lri Github：[連結](https://github.com/DreamingLri/masa-mods-chinese)

授權證明：https://i.imgur.com/XJ5KeEM.jpg


</details>
